query:
DELETE FROM pbs_computations p
                WHERE p.host_chain_id = $1
                  AND p.handle = ANY($2::bytea[])
                  AND NOT EXISTS (
                      SELECT 1
                      FROM pbs_computations_branch b
                      WHERE b.host_chain_id = p.host_chain_id
                        AND b.handle = p.handle
                  )
